title: Seattle Fairmont Olympic Hotel impressed our whole family
content: # Hotel Review: Seattle Fairmont Olympic Hotel. Not too long ago, we had the opportunity to visit Seattle and stay at the venerable Seattle Fairmont Olympic Hotel. Yes, many good memories were made at that fine hotel, and I am so glad to have made more on our visit to the Seattle Fairmont Olympic Hotel. Joining the Fairmont family of hotels in 2003, the grand Olympic Hotel has long been a part of the social fabric of Seattle. The original building was constructed in 1924 on the original site of University of Washington’s first location, and is listed on the National Register of Historic Places. Our bedroom at the Fairmont Olympic was connected to the sitting room. Really it was so awesome I wrote a whole other blog post about it – click Afternoon Tea at the Seattle Fairmont Olympic Hotel for more details on this cool experience.

title: A Review of The Fairmont Olympic Hotel Seattle Washington
content: Our stay was excellent – staff was friendly and quick to offer answers to any of our questions, beds were comfortable and it was quiet at night!

title: Fairmont Olympic Hotel, Seattle - KAYAK

title: Review of - Fairmont Olympic Hotel - Seattle - Tripadvisor
content: The hotel is absolutely beautiful—elegant and inviting from the very first impression. The front desk staff couldn't have been more welcoming

title: FAIRMONT OLYMPIC HOTEL, SEATTLE - Updated June 2026 - Yelp
